data.html:
Welcome to EasySchematic!

Getting started:
• Drag devices from the library, or double-click the canvas to quick-add
• Click an output port, then click an input to connect
• Right-click a connection to add routing handles
• Right-click a room to change its style

Tips:
• ★ Star your favorite devices in the library for faster access
• Use the search bar — multi-word queries like "ethernet switch" work great
• F9 toggles Print View for page layout and PDF export
• Space + drag to pan, Ctrl+Z to undo

Your work auto-saves to your browser. Use Save to export a file and Load to import one.

Full docs at docs.easyschematic.live
